title: chrysanthemum sinaicum
intro: Chrysanthemum sinaicum, also known as the Korean chrysanthemum, is a perennial plant native to East Asia, belonging to the Asteraceae family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been found to have various medicinal properties, including antimicrobial and antiviral effects. The plant is valued for its health benefits, such as reducing fever, soothing respiratory issues, and improving digestion, making it a popular remedy for various ailments. In traditional Chinese medicine, Chrysanthemum sinaicum is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and capsules, which are believed to promote overall well-being and vitality.
